calendar.matters:
Hearing Re: Unresolved Claims
Off Calendar Oct-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Diala Debbas, 619.326.2471 for Claimant Specialized Loan Servicing.
Gerard Launay, 510.486.1000 for Claimants Wing Cham Kwan and Cicie Fung Kwan.

Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Claims made by Rong Shao ($50,000), Specialized Loan Servicing ($157,142.16), Wing Cham Kwan and Cicie Fung Kwan ($130,000), and Yi Dun Fan Wei (remainder) are granted as requested with proportional share of interest, if any. Diala Debbas for Claimant Specialized Loan Servicing to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b) and all signatures. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
